2605.10094.title: Retrieve-then-Steer: Online Success Memory for Test-Time Adaptation of Generative VLAs
2605.10094.paper_summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models show strong potential for general-purpose robotic manipulation, yet their closed-loop reliability often degrades under local deployment conditions. Existing evaluations typically treat test episodes as independent zero-shot trials. However, real robots often operate repeatedly in the same or slowly changing environments, where successful executions provide environment-verified evidence of reliable behavior patterns. We study this persistent-deployment setting, asking whether a partially competent frozen VLA can improve its reliability by reusing its successful test-time experience. We propose an online success-memory guided test-time adaptation framework for generative VLAs. During deployment, the robot stores progress-calibrated successful observation-action segments in a long-term memory. At inference, it retrieves state-relevant action chunks, filters inconsistent candidates via trajectory-level consistency, and aggregates them into an elite action prior. To incorporate this prior into action generation, we introduce confidence-adaptive prior guidance, which injects the elite prior into an intermediate state of the flow-matching action sampler and adjusts the guidance strength based on retrieval confidence. This design allows the frozen VLA to exploit environment-specific successful experience while preserving observation-conditioned generative refinement. This retrieve-then-steer mechanism enables lightweight, non-parametric test-time adaptation without requiring parameter updates. Simulation and real-world experiments show improved task success and closed-loop stability, especially in long-horizon and multi-stage tasks.
2605.10094.paper_summary_zh: 視覺-語言-行動（VLA）模型顯示出在通用機器人操作方面的強大潛力，但它們在本地部署條件下的閉環可靠性往往會下降。現有的評估通常將測試回合視為獨立的零-shot 試驗。然而，真實的機器人往往在相同或緩慢變化的環境中重複操作，在這些環境中，成功的執行提供了可靠行為模式的環境驗證證據。我們研究這種持續部署的情境，詢問部分能力的凍結 VLA 是否能通過重用其成功的測試時間經驗來提高其可靠性。我們提出了一個在線成功記憶引導的測試時間適應框架，適用於生成性 VLA。在部署期間，機器人將進度校準的成功觀察-行動片段存儲在長期記憶中。在推理時，它檢索與狀態相關的行動片段，通過軌跡級一致性過濾不一致的候選者，並將它們聚合成一個精英行動先驗。為了將這個先驗納入行動生成中，我們引入了信心自適應先驗引導，這會將精英先驗注入流匹配行動採樣器的中間狀態，並根據檢索信心調整引導強度。這種設計使得凍結的 VLA 能夠利用特定環境的成功經驗，同時保留觀察條件的生成性細化。這種檢索然後引導的機制實現了輕量級的非參數測試時間適應，而不需要參數更新。模擬和實驗室實驗顯示了任務成功率和閉環穩定性的改善，尤其是在長期和多階段任務中。
2605.10094.author: Jianchao Zhao et.al.
2605.10094.authors: Jianchao Zhao, Huoren Yang, Hu Yusong, Yuyang Gao, Qiguan Ou, Cong Wan, SongLin Dong, Zhiheng Ma, Yihong Gong
